---
title: "Lab 1 Writing Template"
subtitle: Figures and Captions
format:
  html: default
  docx: default
---

Name:

## Methods

::: {#fig-accelerometer-data}
![]()

Replace this text with your caption.
:::

Insert your figure generated from Matlab here.
Your figure should also include a caption underneath which includes a figure number and a concise description of the contents of the figure.

Below your figure, write 1-3 paragraphs of supporting text to explain what the plotted data represent.
The [writing specifications](./writing.qmd){target="_blank"} describe the aspects of the data you should include.
